item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-10 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+80 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: Machine Learning Engineering Open Book Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +80，前 3 日均值 6.3，加速度 12.6x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] sickn33/agentic-awesome-skills (+113 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Installable GitHub library of 1,900+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Autohand Code, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, and more. Includes specialized plugins, installer CLI, bundles, workflows, and official/community skill collections. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +113，总 stars 42,755，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] google-ai-edge/mediapipe (+36 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: Cross-platform, customizable ML solutions for live and streaming media. Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +36，前 3 日均值 12.7，加速度 2.8x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] addyosmani/agent-skills (+2227 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2227，总 stars 76,311，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+920 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +920，总 stars 54,174，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+646 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 🎨 The open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Local-first desktop app. 🖼️ Your coding agent becomes the design engine: prototypes, landing pages, dashboards, slides, images & video — real files, HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export. 🤖 Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen & 20+ CLIs via BYOK. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +646，总 stars 76,964，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+758 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +758，总 stars 36,419，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI (+2072 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2072，总 stars 13,912，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: The agent harness performance optimization system. item.title: [sustained_hot] asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks (+1305 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1305，总 stars 55,503，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] santifer/career-ops (+292 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Workflow Automation Description: Open-source AI job search: scan job portals, score listings A-F, tailor your CV, track applications — runs locally in your AI coding CLI (Claude Code, Gemini, Codex, OpenCode…) Why it matters: AI Workflow Automation 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +292，总 stars 59,486，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
